name: Multi-Grain & Nut Bread
recipeInstructions: Combine all ingredients except seeds and nuts in the breadbaker, following your machine's instructions. For Panasonic machines with a VARIETY Cycle, set it to dough mode after about 2 hours and 20 minutes (indicated as 1:55 on the machine). Turn off the dough blade before adding seeds and nuts (such as walnuts or sunflower seeds), sesame seeds, poppy seeds, and grated carrots if desired. Mix them evenly into the dough. Place back in the bucket and start the baking process. Alternatively, roll out the dough, add ingredients on top, and roll it up, tucking under the ends.
